Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dawnwing Sect]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Dawnwing Sect is a group that Ziel was once part of.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Dawnwing Sect was chased by the Stormcaller cult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Dawnwing Sect has a champion.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is the former leader of the Dawnwing Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Dawnwing sect's defenses repelled the lesser dragons.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel was the Archlord of the Dawnwing Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Dawnwing Sect has a young Archlord who has returned.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Weeping Dragon previously attacked the Dawnwing Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The former leader of the Dawnwing Sect was bearing a silver shield and a massive hammer.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — The Dawnwing Sect uses a spread-wings symbol.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
